name: Cantaloupe Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove rind and seeds from cantaloupe.
2. Cored, peeled, and cut pineapple into small chunks.
3. Cored and cut apple into small chunks.
4. Cut the cantaloupes into small chunks and mix with all the other fruits and walnuts in a large salad bowl.
5. Scoop yogurt into individual serving bowls and pass out the fruit salad.
6. Stir to coat and eat.
